relations.subject: Golden-breasted starling
relations.evidence: It is distributed in Northeastern Africa, from Somalia, Ethiopia, Kenya and northern Tanzania. These birds inhabit the grassland, savannah, the thickets of acacias, dry-thorn forests and shrubland. thumb|240px|left| At Bird Kingdom, Niagara Falls, Canada
